name: mcp-hive
description: MCP Hive is a hub which connects MCP Server Consumers to paid MCP Servers. For example, paid MCP Servers might serve protected content, served by original copyright owners; paid MCP Servers can serve data which was built by expert systems, such as financial and sports data repositories.
